title: Legacy Filesystem Extension

classes.name: FSEntryController
classes.notes: Batched write queue with currentState/deferredState flip. All writes (insert/update/delete) go via enqueue_. Reads go directly to db. find() dispatches to findByPath/findByUID/findByID based on selector type.

classes.name: PuterFSProvider
methods: move({context, node, new_parent, new_name, metadata}): Promise<FSNode>
classes.notes: MAX_DIRECTORY_DEPTH=35 enforced on mkdir/copy_tree/move. #storage_upload delegates to storageController.upload(). stat() coordinates between svc_resource and fsEntryController.waitForEntry(). Calls FSNodeContext.sanitize_pending_entry_info() (static) on write operations.

classes.name: S3StorageController
methods: -#copy_multipart({dst_bucket_region, dst_bucket, src_bucket, src_key, dst_key, on_progress, size}): Promise<Object>
classes.notes: Extension-context S3 storage. upload() branches on file.buffer (PutObject) vs stream (multipart, 5MB parts, max 4 concurrent). copy() branches on size < 4GB (simple CopyObject) vs multipart (4GiB parts). Used via mountpoint service. Parallel to deprecated PuterS3Service.

classes.name: PuterS3Service
methods: create_read_stream({bucket_region, bucket, key, version_id, range}): Promise<Readable>
put_stream({size, bucket_region, bucket, key, stream, on_progress}): Promise<Object>
upload_stream({bucket_region, bucket, key, stream, on_progress}): Promise<Object>
copy_simple({dst_bucket_region, dst_bucket, src_bucket, src_key, dst_key}): Promise<Object>
copy_multipart({dst_bucket_region, dst_bucket, src_bucket, src_key, dst_key, on_progress, size}): Promise<Object>
classes.notes: DEPRECATED. On install, creates PuterS3StorageStrategy and registers it in context ('storage') and with mountpoint service under key 'PuterFSProvider'. Has additional put_stream (single PutObject with progress) not in S3StorageController. upload_stream uses 5MB parts, max 4 concurrent.

classes.name: FSNodeContext
classes.notes: DEPRECATED. Facade (design pattern) for all info about a filesystem node. Constructor checks ECMAP for cached instances. All fetch* methods auto-decorated with OTel spans. get() supports keys: entry, path, uid/uuid, mysql-id, owner, immutable, user_id, name, size, parent_uid, metadata, type, has-s3, s3:location, is-root, writable. s3:location returns {bucket, bucket_region, key=uuid}.

relationships: PuterFSProvider COMPOSES FSEntryController (constructor injection, field: fsEntryController)
PuterFSProvider COMPOSES S3StorageController (constructor injection, field: storageController)
PuterFSProvider USES FSNodeContext (node parameter type throughout)
FSNodeContext DEPENDS_ON PuterFSProvider (field: provider, calls provider.stat(), provider.get_recursive_size(), provider.directory_has_name())
FSNodeContext CALLS fetchEntry → provider.stat(selector, options, node, controls)
PuterS3Service REGISTERS_WITH mountpoint service as storage for 'PuterFSProvider'
FSEntryController USES BaseOperation (Insert, Update, Delete extend BaseOperation)
FSEntryController WRITES db (via db.batch_write in exec_())
external_dependencies: db — SQL database accessed by FSEntryController and PuterFSProvider

AWS SDK: PutObjectCommand, GetObjectCommand, DeleteObjectCommand, CreateMultipartUploadCommand, UploadPartCommand, CompleteMultipartUploadCommand, AbortMultipartUploadCommand, CopyObjectCommand, UploadPartCopyCommand
svc_event — emits fs.create.*, fs.write.*, fs.move.*, fs.pending.* events
svc_acl — access control checks in PuterFSProvider
ECMAP — entity-context map for FSNodeContext caching
TeePromise — resolvable promise used in queue and S3 concurrency control
EWMA — exponential weighted moving average for S3 part timing
key_patterns: FSEntryController uses dual-queue (currentState/deferredState) with atomic flip to batch DB writes without blocking reads
PuterFSProvider is a filesystem provider interface (strategy pattern) — methods map to FS operations (read/write/mkdir/move/copy/delete)
S3StorageController and PuterS3Service are parallel implementations (extension vs. deprecated backend service) with nearly identical multipart upload logic
FSNodeContext is a Facade (documented as such) wrapping lazy-loaded fsentry data with OTel-traced fetch methods
PuterS3Service.__on_install registers PuterS3StorageStrategy with mountpoint so PuterFSProvider can retrieve it via svc_mountpoint.get_storage('PuterFSProvider')
